news.t: Invesco Advances Its Fixed Income ETF Lineup with Launch of Four New Funds

overview.description: The Invesco Agency MBS ETF (IMTG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF investing in US agency mortgage-backed securities of any maturity. It may include government, residential and commercial mortgage-backed securities. IMTG was launched on Feb 25, 2026 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Invesco Advances Its Fixed Income ETF Lineup with Launch of Four New Funds
data.text: New ETFs deepen Invesco's fixed income lineup, supporting a comprehensive, diversified suite built to meet evolving investor needs. ATLANTA, Feb. 25, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Ltd.
